architecture_status.prefix_ast_inference: freezes saved AST vocabulary, reports fallback_rate, unknown_rate, and avg_ms
architecture_status.boundary_module: strictly causal boundary_width-token update from previous block tail
architecture_status.stage0_prefix_ast_degradation: scripts/prefix_ast_degradation.py reports fallback_rate, unknown_rate, prefix_full_divergence, and avg_ms
architecture_status.block_size_boundary: paper derives B*=((2bL)/a)^(1/3) for the simplified aLB+bL^2/B^2 cost model; block size remains an ablation variable
architecture_status.offline_ast_preprocessing: defaults to complete-file parse for training artifacts; prefix and per-token prefix modes are explicit diagnostics/inference paths
architecture_status.definition_masks: Python binding spans are preferred for token-level definition masks; tree-sitter remains the AST type-id source and fallback definition detector
architecture_status.input_contracts: model forward validates token ids, AST ids, mask dtypes, integer lengths, and out-of-range metadata before embedding or masking
architecture_status.input_range_fast_path: token/AST id range scans are enabled by default and can be disabled after pipeline validation; dtype, shape, and length checks remain active
architecture_status.data_pipeline_preflight: scripts/validate_data_pipeline.py checks token ids, AST ids, AST block shapes, masks, and usable lengths before --no-input-range-validation
architecture_status.cvd_valid_blocks: variable-targeted CVD intersects definition masks with valid-block masks so padded blocks are never eligible
architecture_status.batch_feature_broadcast: two-dimensional AST ids and one-dimensional definition masks can be broadcast across a batch for shared diagnostic features
architecture_status.transformer_input_contracts: token-only Transformer controls share fail-fast token-id and integer-length validation with the CSMT model
architecture_status.incremental_ast_contracts: IncrementalASTConfig validates block_size and max_tokens and the CLI no longer relies on assert statements
architecture_status.cvd_audit_contracts: CVD sampling counters are opt-in through cvd_audit; default training samples masks without per-step count synchronization
architecture_status.cvd_token_mask_contract: token-level CVD masks are reduced using the current forward-pass block count, preventing short next-token inputs from being misread as block-level masks

verification_status.system_python: Python 3.10.11 lacks NumPy and PyTorch in this workspace
verification_status.bundled_python: Python 3.12.13 has NumPy and PDF packages, but lacks torch/tree_sitter/tree_sitter_python
verification_status.torch_forward_backward: passed through scripts/diagnostic_poc_train.py tiny CPU run; 10 variants completed 12 steps each, including transformer_baseline and transformer_matched
verification_status.diagnostic_poc_train: passed locally on CPU with independent Transformer controls; results/diagnostic_poc_transformer.json and results/lowcompute_validation_summary.md written; not a benchmark
verification_status.python_syntax: passed with .venv-lowcompute Python 3.10.11 on 2026-06-25 after token-level CVD mask fix
verification_status.unit_tests: 37/37 passed with PyTorch CPU in .venv-lowcompute on 2026-06-25 after token-level CVD mask regression coverage
verification_status.data_pipeline_preflight: passed on 3 tiny diagnostic samples; results/data_pipeline_validation.json written
verification_status.diagnostics_smoke: passed; generated shadowing, long_range_import, and guarded_attribute arrays with refined Python-binding definition masks
verification_status.prefix_ast_smoke: passed with tree-sitter in .venv-lowcompute; inference_ast.py avg_ms=1.555 over repeat=32 on prefix_probe.py
verification_status.paper_compile: passed with Docker TeX Live on 2026-06-25 after token-level CVD mask fix; PDF is 16 pages; final log has no real warnings
verification_status.paper_text_scan: passed after token-level CVD mask fix; no stale target, first-person plural, formula-placeholder, or compute-apology remnants
verification_status.paper_visual_check: passed on rendered pages 15 and 16 after token-level CVD mask fix; local-diagnostic appendix renders correctly
verification_status.arxiv_package: rebuilt after token-level CVD mask fix; upload_ready=true; files: main.tex, main.bbl, references.bib, arxiv_metadata.json
verification_status.github_release_package: rebuilt after token-level CVD mask fix; zip integrity passed with 55 files and no corrupt entries
verification_status.prefix_ast_degradation: passed with tree-sitter; fallback_rate=0.3846, unknown_rate=0.0000, prefix_full_divergence=0.4615, avg_ms=4.296 on tiny prefix_probe.py
verification_status.lowcompute_environment: created .venv-lowcompute with Python 3.10.11, NumPy 2.2.6, tree-sitter 0.25.x, and torch 2.12.1+cpu; GPU not used
verification_status.docker: docker hello-world passed; Docker daemon is usable
verification_status.block_size_smoke: passed for block_size 4, 8, and 16 on Transformer and CSMT tiny diagnostic variants; no performance claim
verification_status.seed_smoke: passed for seeds 1, 2, and 3 on Transformer and CSMT tiny diagnostic variants; no performance claim
verification_status.cvd_evidence_boundary: variable CVD and random CVD final losses differ by -0.00007439 in the 12-step diagnostic; CVD benefit is not established
verification_status.structural_probe_eval: passed; results/structural_probe_eval.json records definition-use and cross-block coverage; not model accuracy
verification_status.cvd_mask_audit: passed; variable scope sampled only definition-eligible blocks while random scope sampled all valid blocks; not model quality evidence
verification_status.transformer_comparison: passed as a smoke test; transformer_matched is a rough parameter-neighbor control, and results do not establish that CSMT-GNN beats Transformer
verification_status.architecture_cost_table: passed; results/architecture_cost_table.json records dense causal edge counts vs block-local plus block-graph edge counts; not a runtime benchmark
